title: ConfirmCardData
description: Data payload for a `confirm` card (CardEnvelope.data when type='confirm').

heading.description: Optional in-body heading. Distinct from CardEnvelope.title (the card chrome title).

body.description: Body text. Plain text in v1 (rendered safely; no HTML injection).

tone.description: Overall card tone; 'danger' adds a warning icon + accent for destructive approvals.

actions.description: The choice set. Rendered as buttons in order; max 4 keeps it a decision, not a menu.

id.description: Emitted as CardEvent.action. Must be unique within `actions`.

payload.description: Optional opaque payload echoed back in CardEvent.payload (any JSON).

default.description: If true, this action is the keyboard default (Enter) and gets initial focus. At most one should be true; the card uses the first if several are.

dismissible.description: Show a close affordance that emits the `dismiss` verb.
